globalRules: disabled overrides hovered, pressed, focused, selected, and open visual states
focus ring is additive and uses theme.focus.* tokens
boolean props affect structure/content rendering; they do not create hidden visual states unless listed below

keyboard: default
focused
pressed
focused

events.focusVisible: set state=focused and render focus ring
events.escape: set isOpen=false and keep focus on trigger/base

keyboard: Enter activates
Space activates for button-like controls
notes: Open panels close on Escape and outside click.

events.pointerUp: return to hovered if pointer remains inside
